ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* Date of the fiscal year end */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement type */,
  "statement_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial statement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial statement type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the financial statement */,
  "is_standardized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the financial statement is standardized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_items" (
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line item */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the line item belongs to */,
  "line_item_name" TEXT /* Name of the line item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the line item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the line item */,
  "is_summary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the line item is a summary line */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the line item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounting_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accounting period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the accounting period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the accounting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the accounting period */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the accounting period */,
  "is_closed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the accounting period is closed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the accounting period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the accounting period was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the accounting period */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the accounting period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounting_periods_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounting_periods_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data point */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the data belongs to */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the data belongs to */,
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the line item the data belongs to */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accounting period the data belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* The actual financial value for the given company, statement, line item, and period */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the financial value */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment */,
  "adjustment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the financial data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial data was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the financial data */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES accounting_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_line_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_item_id") REFERENCES line_items ("line_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, accountant, executive) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "query" TEXT /* SQL query used to generate the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., grid, chart) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dashboard */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dashboard is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
